name: Corundum_mqnic_app_block_sync_rx
description: Corundum mqnic_app_block *axis_sync_* RX streaming interface — default 100G configuration with PTP TOD timestamp. Models the datapath-synchronous RX interface (PTP_TS_ENABLE=1, PTP_TS_FMT_TOD=1). NOTE: TX TUSER is only 17 bits (TX_TAG_WIDTH+1), RX is 97 bits; this ISL models the wider RX path only.
source: Corundum open-source NIC (github.com/corundum/corundum) — mqnic_app_block.sv, axis_sync_rx module. PTP timestamp format verified against Corundum PTP core and IEEE 1588 TOD format.

tuser_fields.description: PTP Timestamp — seconds portion (48-bit TOD format)
PTP Timestamp — nanoseconds portion (48-bit TOD format)
